title: Nostalgia POM PBR
description: A POM PBR pack for based on the pre texture update textures.
body:
I noticed the lack of 1.8.9 prb packs, so I decided to make one myself.

 

Feel free to use as long as you don't attempt to pass it off as your own (If you are using the pack in a video/image/etc. please leave a link in the description of the video/image, this rule is optional, I won't do anything if you don't put the link in the description, but please put the link in the description, it will help people find this pack)

 

(This pack is work in progress, but already has a lot of textures, if a texture is not present, that will most likely be fixed in a later version)
